<!-- Keep sections that apply; delete the ones that don't. -->

## Why
<!-- The problem, need, or finding this addresses, and why it matters. -->

## What changed
<!-- Bullet the concrete changes. Name the key types/files added, removed, or moved. -->
-

## Behavior
<!-- Does observable behavior change? If it's a refactor, say "No behavior change"
     and note why (public contract preserved, callers untouched). Otherwise
     describe the new or changed behavior. -->

## Scope
<!-- What is intentionally left out of this change, and where it's handled instead. -->

## Tests
<!-- New or updated tests and what they verify. Note any existing suites still passing. -->

## Verification
<!-- How this was checked end to end: commands run and their results, manual steps, etc. -->
